# Claude Chat Mobile
> Phone UI that drives your terminal claude via the Agent SDK. Same session, same host settings; touch layout, not a screen mirror. Single-driver; single-user per instance—not multi-tenant SaaS.

## Primary
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/en/quickstart.html
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/en/security.html
- https://github.com/Ike-li/claude-chat-mobile
- Spec: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/agent-sdk/overview

## Handbook (Chinese)
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/pages/overview.html

- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/pages/security-model.html
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/pages/production-deploy.html
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/pages/terminal-parity.html
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/pages/single-driver.html
- https://ike-li.github.io/claude-chat-mobile/docs-site/pages/boundaries.html
